title: Halo: The Master Chief Collection Gameplay Map

narrative.description: 343 Industries' compilation remasters Halo CE through Halo 4 with unified matchmaking, cross-game continuity, and the foundational console FPS loop of shield recharge, grenade arcs, and vehicle combat.
narrative.core_loop: Fight through campaign missions with shield-managed gunplay, exploit weapon sandboxes, and use vehicles and grenades to control encounter arenas.

mechanics.map_notes: Multiple Halo campaigns and multiplayer modes in one remastered package.
mechanics.expression: Multiple Halo campaigns and multiplayer modes in one remastered package.

mechanics.map_notes: Shields recharge after delay; health sits beneath as secondary pool in later entries.
mechanics.expression: Shields recharge after delay; health sits beneath as secondary pool in later entries.

mechanics.map_notes: Campaign missions selectable with co-op and difficulty options.
mechanics.expression: Campaign missions selectable with co-op and difficulty options.

mechanics.map_notes: Hitscan and projectile weapons fire on trigger pull.
mechanics.expression: Hitscan and projectile weapons fire on trigger pull.

mechanics.map_notes: Warthog, Ghost, and Banshee vehicles alter combat capabilities.
mechanics.expression: Warthog, Ghost, and Banshee vehicles alter combat capabilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Key set pieces like Flood gates span multi-arena sequences.
mechanics.expression: Key set pieces like Flood gates span multi-arena sequences.

mechanics.map_notes: Elite and Hunter pairs follow flanking attack patterns.
mechanics.expression: Elite and Hunter pairs follow flanking attack patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Plasma pools, lifts, and zero-g sections alter traversal.
mechanics.expression: Plasma pools, lifts, and zero-g sections alter traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Skulls, terminals, and collectibles reward replay.
mechanics.expression: Skulls, terminals, and collectibles reward replay.

mechanics.map_notes: Elite sword lunge telegraphs with audio and animation wind-up.
mechanics.expression: Elite sword lunge telegraphs with audio and animation wind-up.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Halo: The Master Chief Collection through its core shooter loop.
